items.title: Regularly $80 CHERRY XTRFY M68 wireless gaming mouse is 75% off today at just $20
items.summary: We just spotted a deal at Woot, which drops the CHERRY XTRFY M68 wireless gaming mouse to $19.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). Be sure to enter promo code CHERRYFIVE during checkout to see the discounted price. Originally priced at $90 and more recently selling closer to $80, today’s deal saves you $60 and takes 75% off its usual going rate. It also comes in $5 below the deal we previously tracked, making this the best price we have seen for the mouse so far. Both the black and white finishes are down to the $20 mark today with the promo code.

items.title: Best Buy 3D printer flash sale drops Bambu Lab’s P1S Combo to $499 low and throws in FREE filaments today
items.summary: As part of its wider sale on 3D printers and accessories, Best Buy is offering the Bambu Lab P1S Combo 3D printer bundled with black and white filament spools for $499.99 shipped today. This AMS Combo typically sells for $599, so today’s flash sale knocks $99 off its usual price. Best Buy is also throwing in Bambu Lab’s Tough+ black and white filament spools, valued at $24 each, for free, making this an especially strong value for anyone looking to pick up a new 3D printer with $147 in savings. For comparison, Amazon currently has the P1S Combo listed at $549, while B&H is matching the $499 price without the two free filament spools. Best Buy’s bundle is therefore the better overall deal here, and we’ve highlighted some of our other favorite offers from the sale below.

items.title: Satechi’s anodized aluminum Slim EX Wireless Mouse with metal scroll wheel down at $24
items.summary:
Satechi metal Slim EX Wireless Mouse

Buy for $24 (Reg. $30)

What we love

Alongside the launch of the new MacBook Neo colorways, the more traditional black Satechi Slim EX Wireless Mouse has dropped to $24 at Amazon. This one featured an anodized aluminum frame with a metal scroll wheel, a removable battery delivers up to “three months of continuous use,” and the ability to switch between two Bluetooth channels and a 2.4GHz USB-C receiver “with no re-pairing” (Mac, Windows, tablet, and desktop).

items.title: Ninja’s popular Crispi 4-in-1 portable glass cooking system is currently starting from $159 ($6 above Prime Day)
items.summary: Over at Amazon you can pick up the popular Ninja Crispi 4-in-1 Portable Glass Cooking System starting down at $159 shipped, which beats out the direct website pricing by $1. Normally $180 without discounts, we’ve seen the deal here for this particular colorway only beaten out by June’s Prime Day pricing of $153. While some of the other colorways have dropped a little lower in price, this is still a solid $21 markdown for the second-best price on this model, while still landing amongst the lowest prices for many of its counterparts. You’ll find even more Ninja deals on appliances, cookware, and more in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Beam wired-only audio to AirPods with Twelve South AirFly SE at just $29 (Matching Prime Day price)
items.summary:
Twelve South AirFly SE Wireless Audio Transmitter

Buy for $28.50 (Reg. $35)

What we love

It not might be the latest model, but if all you’re looking for is something affordable to beam audio from wired-only sources to your AirPods (or other wireless headphones) without carrying a cable around that might not even be compatible, it will certainly do the job. Alongside 20 hours of battery life, it’s not only handy on flights, but also gym equipment, gaming devices, or any other 3.5mm audio jack source.

items.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta

items.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
